subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm and steadfast in the Covenant and Testament! Praise be to God that under all conditions thou hast been aided and successful
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابته راسخه بر عهد و پیمان الحمد لله در جمیع احوال موید و موفق بودید و سبب
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
